chunks.title: Daniel's Preparation for Prayer
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction setting the time and Daniel's resolve to pray.

chunks.title: Daniel's Confession and Supplication
chunks.reason: A continuous prayer of confession, appeal to God's character, and plea for mercy.

chunks.title: Gabriel's Arrival and Message
chunks.reason: Narrative transition where Gabriel appears and begins speaking to Daniel.

chunks.title: The Prophecy of Seventy Weeks
chunks.reason: Gabriel delivers the specific prophetic timeline regarding the people and the holy city.
